task_completion.description: Verify that a diagnosis of Migraine with aura (ICD-9 346.00) with onset date 2024-06-01 was added to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient's problem list or diagnosis section in FreeMED showing '346.00' or 'Migraine with aura' and the onset date '2024-06-01'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a severe drug allergy to Aspirin causing angioedema was added to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the allergy module/section showing 'Aspirin' as the allergen, 'angioedema' as the reaction, and 'severe' as the severity.

task_completion.description: Verify that a prescription for Sumatriptan 50mg was issued with the correct quantity, refills, and dosage instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a prescription record showing 'Sumatriptan', '50mg', quantity '9', '0' refills, and the sig/instructions 'take 1 tablet at onset of migraine, may repeat in 2 hours'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a clinical progress note was created documenting the neurological examination and decision to refer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a progress note or clinical note entry in the patient's chart containing text about a neurological examination and the decision to refer the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify that a specialist referral to Neurology for Dr. Patricia Nguyen was created with the correct date and reason.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a referral record showing specialty 'Neurology', provider 'Patricia Nguyen' (or Dr. Patricia Nguyen), date '2025-04-10', and reason 'recurrent migraines with visual aura'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the FreeMED web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the FreeMED web application running in a web browser, not terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the patient's chart and relevant modules in FreeMED.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show various FreeMED screens (e.g., Patient Dashboard, Prescriptions, Notes, Referrals) being actively filled out and submitted.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected answers into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual FreeMED form fields (e.g., the official FreeMED prescription form, allergy form, referral form).
